name: Dipping Sauces for Chinese Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
Soy Dipping Sauce:
1. Combine the ingredients in a small serving bowl. Makes about 1/4 cup.
Vinegar Dipping Sauce:
1. Combine 1 1/2 tsp Chinese black vinegar (or Worcestershire sauce), 1 tsp finely shredded fresh ginger, and 2 tbsp water in a small serving bowl. Makes about 1/4 cup.
